title: Bopipias.
content:
Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep,
	 And couldn�t tell where to find �em.
	     Let �em alone, and they�ll come home,
	 And bring their tails behind �em.

	    Parvula Bopipias amissos qu�ritat agnos,
	     Nec reperire locum quo latu�re potest.
	    Desine, Bopipias, redeuntes nocte videbis,
	     Caudasque incolumes post sua crura ferent.
meaning:
"Bopipias." is a quintessential example of Jacob Bigelow's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
